description_long: This is a pair of high-top canvas sneakers, predominantly black with white rubber toe caps and midsoles. The shoes feature a classic lace-up design with silver eyelets and light gray laces, and the stitching is visible along the seams, adding to the iconic look. The interior lining appears to be a muted green, and the outsole is textured for grip. On the back heel, there is visible branding and text, typical of Converse All Star shoes. The overall shape is structured yet flexible, suitable for casual urban wear. The shoes are clean and show no signs of wear, indicating they are in new condition.
description: A pair of black high-top canvas sneakers with white rubber toe caps, gray laces, and visible branding on the heel. The shoes are clean, structured, and ideal for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both shoes with gray laces, white toe caps, and the high-top design clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black canvas upper, white midsole, and the classic lace-up pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel branding, black canvas back, and greenish interior lining.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the canvas texture, stitching, and the full profile of the shoe.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star logo patch on the inner ankle and rectangular Converse All Star text on the heel in black and white.
